name: youtube-mcp-server
title: YouTube
description: YouTube video search, channel discovery, playlist browsing, and transcript extraction via Data API v3
author: ZubeidHendricks
tagline: Search, discover, and transcribe YouTube content

highlights.text: Video search — advanced filters by date, duration, quality
Channels — info, subscriber bands, creator discovery
Playlists — browse and list playlist contents
Read-only — no writes, no OAuth, just an API key

readme:
### What it does

YouTube MCP Server gives your AI agent read-only access to YouTube’s content library via the Data API v3. Search for videos with advanced filters, discover channels and creators, browse playlists, and extract full transcripts — all from conversation.

Your agent can research a topic across YouTube, find the most relevant creators, pull transcripts for summarisation, and compile findings without you opening a browser.

### Token efficiency

YouTube API responses include extensive metadata — thumbnails at multiple resolutions, localization data, and content rating details. The 10 tools focus on returning the fields that matter for AI workflows: titles, descriptions, statistics, and transcript text.

### Safety model

Completely read-only. The YouTube Data API v3 with an API key provides no write access — no uploads, no comments, no playlist modifications. Your YouTube account is never at risk.

### Quota awareness

YouTube Data API v3 has a daily quota (10,000 units by default). Search costs 100 units per call, while most other operations cost 1-3 units. The agent should prefer targeted searches over broad sweeps to conserve quota.

scenarios.label: Research a topic via video transcripts
scenarios.body: Search for videos on a topic, filter by relevance and recency, extract transcripts from the top results, and summarise key points across multiple sources.

scenarios.label: Discover creators in a niche
scenarios.body: Search for channels covering a specific topic, compare subscriber counts and upload frequency, and compile a shortlist of active creators worth following.

scenarios.label: Summarise a conference playlist
scenarios.body: Browse a conference or event playlist, extract transcripts from each talk, and produce a structured summary of the key presentations and themes.

env.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
env.description: YouTube Data API v3 key from Google Cloud Console

setup.help_text: Create a project at Google Cloud Console, enable the YouTube Data API v3, then create an API key under Credentials. Restrict the key to YouTube Data API v3 only.
prerequisites: Google Cloud project with YouTube Data API v3 enabled

certification.security_notes: Read-only YouTube Data API access. API key scoped to YouTube Data API v3. No write operations, no OAuth user context.

notes: 10-tool YouTube MCP (473 stars). Covers video search with advanced filters, channel info with subscriber band filtering, creator discovery, playlist browsing, and transcript extraction. Requires YouTube Data API v3 key.
